items.title: Selgate Launches First Specialist Hospital With Over 30 Specialists
items.summary: Selgate has launched its first specialist hospital, SSH Rawang, that fills a gap in private health care access in northern Selangor. The post Selgate Launches First Specialist Hospital With Over 30 Specialists appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Clarity Is A Clinical Tool, Not A Cultural Preference — Dr Lim Ren Jye
items.summary: I use Bahasa Malaysia daily with my colleagues and patients. But clinical reality demands pragmatism, not dogma. When dealing with an anxious or illiterate grandmother, forcing a rigid linguistic template isn't patriotism; it's a clinical hazard. The post Clarity Is A Clinical Tool, Not A Cultural Preference — Dr Lim Ren Jye appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Why Young Malaysians Are Becoming More Vulnerable To Diabetes — Nicson Yap Yong Ze
items.summary: Diabetes among young Malaysians is linked to diet, lifestyle, education, and daily habits, and if these issues continue to be ignored, they may face chronic health conditions earlier in life. The post Why Young Malaysians Are Becoming More Vulnerable To Diabetes — Nicson Yap Yong Ze appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Why Microwaves Aren’t The Villains We Think They Are — Tan Lih Sy & Mohammad Irwan Hakeem
items.summary: Scientific evidence continues to show that when used correctly, microwaves are safe and can even help preserve nutrients better than some conventional cooking methods. The post Why Microwaves Aren’t The Villains We Think They Are — Tan Lih Sy & Mohammad Irwan Hakeem appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Why Vaccination Must Become A Pillar Of Cardiovascular Prevention — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin & Dr Zulkifli Ismail
items.summary: Implementing routine adult immunisations for cardiac patients is a highly cost-effective intervention that can directly ease the severe financial strain on the health care system. The post Why Vaccination Must Become A Pillar Of Cardiovascular Prevention — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin & Dr Zulkifli Ismail appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: IBD Has No Borders: Access To IBD Care — Prof Dr Raja Affendi Raja Ali
items.summary: IBD is no longer a rare "Western" disease because Malaysia's national IBD incidence has nearly doubled over the past decade. We are now seeing rising IBD cases in rural and semi-urban areas, beyond urban centres and specific genetic risk profiles. The post IBD Has No Borders: Access To IBD Care — Prof Dr Raja Affendi Raja Ali appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysia Must Invest In Ageing-At-Home Framework
items.summary: Malaysia must provide grants for age-friendly home renovations, subsidised installation of accessibility modifications, caregiver allowances, and incentives for employers to support workers if policymakers expect families to care for older parents at home. The post Malaysia Must Invest In Ageing-At-Home Framework appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: DRG Based On Severity Levels, Not Insurer-Determined Fee Range: ProtectHealth
items.summary: ProtectHealth says its DRG price guide will use severity levels to set target fees for inpatient cases under Base MHIT, not broad procedure cost ranges published by the insurance industry. The DRG framework is designed to cover most groups of diseases. The post DRG Based On Severity Levels, Not Insurer-Determined Fee Range: ProtectHealth appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Too Few Malaysian Adults Are Protected Against Influenza
items.summary: Experts urge high-risk adults to get their influenza shots at private and public health care facilities ahead of the mid-year influenza season. The post Too Few Malaysian Adults Are Protected Against Influenza appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Lessons From The Past, Vaccines For The Future: A Malaysian Story Of Hope — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin & Dr Zulkifli Ismail
items.summary: The Hib success shows that local data, cost-effectiveness analysis, and a champion with moral clarity can overcome even economic collapse. The post Lessons From The Past, Vaccines For The Future: A Malaysian Story Of Hope — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin & Dr Zulkifli Ismail appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Police arrest eight, seize ketamine and ecstasy in KL hotel raid linked to a sudden death case
items.summary: KUALA LUMPUR, May 24 — Police arrested eight individuals of various nationalities for alleged drug abuse in a raid...
